case_title: MYUNG KI HONG VS. JAMES ANTHONY FINLEY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG,MYUNG,KI AS TO DEFENDANT FINLEY, JAMES ANTHONY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-10-2002

RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG,MYUNG,KI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JAN 8,2002 IS OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-27-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO APPLY FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST DESIGNATION PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 3.0(D). THE FEB-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-27-2002 CONTINUED TO MAY-08-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 TO APPLY FOR UNISURED MOTORIST DESIGNATION PURSUANT TO LR 3.0(D) MAR-27-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-10-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. MAY-08-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG,MYUNG,KI

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO APPLY FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST DESIGNATION PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 3.0 (D). JUL-10-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG,MYUNG,KI
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
